output.output_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.png
output.output_prompt_json: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.json

critical_requirements: Use the corresponding prop/subject design document's section `4. 解构` as the primary source of truth.
Generate one single-subject prop image only; do not redesign the prop, add characters, or turn it into a scene poster.
Preserve the upstream subject identity, silhouette, scale logic, material facts, wear state, narrative function, style, and negative constraints.
Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for gpt-image-2; use the deconstruction content instead.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no people, no hands, no character takeover, no product lineup, no multi-object collection unless explicitly defined upstream, no redesign, no unrelated background story
